project.title: Prison Break Arena
project.description: Top-down action game set in a brutal maximum-security prison.
project.art_direction: gritty stylized 2D game art, desaturated gray-blue palette with orange prison jumpsuit accents, thick readable silhouettes

asset.name: prison_inmate
asset.description: hardened prison inmate fighter, orange jumpsuit with number patch, shaved head, scarred knuckles, heavy boots, defiant stance, full body single character

plan.prompt: Hardened prison inmate fighter in an orange jumpsuit with a number patch, shaved head, scarred knuckles, and heavy boots. Single character, full body, neutral standing pose, facing right, defiant stance, centered. Pure flat white background (#FFFFFF), uniform studio backdrop, no borders, no frames, no vignettes, no gradients, no textures, no cast shadows on the ground. Clean thick readable silhouette. Gritty stylized 2D game art, desaturated gray-blue palette with orange prison jumpsuit accents.
negative_hints: Do not prompt for transparent background or checkerboard.
Do not include multiple characters or action frames.
Do not include borders, frames, vignettes, gradients, or textured backdrops.
Character sprite only — not a prison scene, not environmental background, not item icon.
No prison walls, bars, cells, floors, or scenery behind the character.
